quote.mayonnaise.1: Say it, don't spray it brother. Dang.
quote.mayonnaise.3: There look, I'm putting the Mayonnaise on the skin. I'm rubbing it in.
quote.mayonnaise.4: Where's my supplies. Yeah, come on man, I thought we had a deal.
quote.mayonnaise.rare: At least it ain't a road flare this time.
